steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks: “Which statement about the mycelium of the twenty mushroom species is best supported by the text?” We need the answer choice that the passage’s evidence directly confirms.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Variation in thermoregulation across the mycelium may occur independent of the presence or absence of fruiting bodies.": The passage states that the temperature difference persisted even after fruiting bodies were detached, proving the mycelium’s thermoregulation is not caused by the fruiting bodies. This is directly supported. ✓
  • "The correlation between higher mycelium temperature and greater fruit productivity indicates that successful reproduction may be dependent on thermoregulation in the mycelium.": Misstates the temperature relationship between fruiting and nonfruiting sites, contradicting passage details. ✗
  • "Temperatures in the fruiting areas of the mycelium are lower than in the nonfruiting areas due to differences in the depth and spread of the mycelium within soil or other organic matter.": Introduces unmentioned details about mycelium structure not found in the passage. ✗
  • "The mycelium generally maintains temperatures lower than those of the fruiting bodies even when considering temperature variations between fruiting and nonfruiting sites.": Makes an unsupported comparison that the passage does not address. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
